name: Servant of Decay
explicitMods: Trigger Level 20 Summon Void Spawn every 4 seconds
5% of Damage from Hits is taken from Void Spawns' Life before you per Void Spawn

flavourText: Eaten away by anxiety and fear,
nothing remained but the void.

explicitMods: Enemies you Kill during Effect have a 25% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element

a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.

descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Death Rush

name: Svalinn
explicitMods: -10% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage

but it was the smiths who delved into the secrets it held.
